name: 道の駅 長島
desc: 東シナ海を一望できる景勝地にある道の駅。九州一の生産量を誇る「赤土ばれいしょ」が名物で、夕日の絶景スポット「サンセットの丘」も隣接。
descEn: In a scenic spot overlooking the East China Sea. Known for red-soil potatoes, of which the area is Kyushu's top producer, and next to Sunset Hill, a popular spot for evening views.

name: 道の駅 黒之瀬戸だんだん市場
desc: 日本三大急潮の一つ「黒之瀬戸海峡」を見下ろす景勝地にある道の駅。天草地方と鹿児島本土を結ぶ黒之瀬戸大橋のたもとに位置し、鰤定食が名物。
descEn: Overlooks the Kuronoseto Strait, one of Japan's three great tidal currents. Located at the foot of the Kuronoseto Bridge connecting the Amakusa region and mainland Kagoshima, known for its yellowtail set meal.
